## What

<!-- One paragraph: what changed and why. The commit history has the how. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `mix format` — no formatting diff
- [ ] `mix credo --strict` — no new violations
- [ ] `mix test` — tests pass
- [ ] New behavior has tests; bug fixes have a test that fails before this change
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated if this is a user-facing change
